The '''72nd Flight''' was a [[Flight group/Legends|flight group]] of [[Confederate Navy/Legends|Confederate Navy]] [[Vulture-class starfighter/Legends|''Vulture''-class]] [[Droid starfighter/Legends|droid starfighters]] in the service of the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==Characteristics==
The [[Confederate Navy/Legends|Confederate Navy's]] 72nd [[Flight group/Legends|Flight]] was comprised of [[Gray|light- and dark-gray]]–[[Color/Legends|colored]] [[Vulture-class starfighter/Legends|''Vulture''-class]] [[Battle droid/Legends|battle droids]] that—as with the Vulture [[Droid/Legends|droids]] of [[128th Flight]]—had more accurate [[Targeting computer/Legends|targeting systems]], but less defensive capabilities, than the [[Droid starfighter/Legends|droid starfighters]] of [[28th Flight]] and [[31st Flight]].<ref name="mini" />

==History==
The 72nd Flight group of droid [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]] fought during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] for the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]].<ref name="mini" />

==Behind the scenes==
72nd Flight was represented with a miniature in the [[Star Wars PocketModel TCG: Base Set|initial release]] of the ''[[Star Wars PocketModel TCG]]'' on [[June]] [[June 19|19]], [[2007]].<ref name="mini" />
